subcodes.first_line: Praise be to the Best-Beloved of all things, that through His abounding grace and plenteous mercies, He hath made His loved ones firm in their love of Him
subcodes.first_line_orig: حمد محبوب علی الاطلاق را که بفضل واسع و رحمت منبسطه احبای خود را بر حبش
subcodes.subjects: @wisdom [hikmat], @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness, @unity; oneness of humanity, @love and unity, @service to others; to the Cause of God, @importance of community building
